name: Acid Rain
description: Creates acidic clouds that pour down acid rain on enemies.

name: Air Cannon
description: Quickly fires a burst of highly pressurized air.

skillFruit.name: Electric Skill Fruit: All Range Thunder

name: Antler Uppercut
description:
Eikthyrdeer's exclusive skill.
Charges at foes and uses antlers to launch them into the air.
If using while riding, the direction of the charge can be controlled.

name: Apocalypse
description: Generates several dark vortexes in the surrounding area.

name: Aqua Burst
description: Creates a giant ball of water and hurls it at an enemy.

name: Aqua Gun
description: Hurls a ball of water straight at an enemy.

name: Beam Comet
description:
Jetragon's exclusive skill.
Flies at enemies on illuminated wings while firing innumerable beams. The Beams explode on impact.

name: Bee Quiet
description:
Beegarde's exclusive skill.
Risks its life to cause a violent explosion, but receives the honor of falling in battle.

name: Blast Punch
description:
Mossanda Lux's exclusive skill.
Winds up its fist before pummeling an enemy with a flurry of electrically charged punches.

name: Blazing Horn
description:
Arsox's exclusive skill.
Takes aim and rushes at an enemy with a mad dash.

name: Blizzard Spike
description: Creates a giant lump of ice and hurls it at an enemy. It deals damage to those in the surrounding area upon impact.

name: Botanical Smash
description:
Dinossom's exclusive skill.
Uses large tail to smash the ground in front of it, damaging enemies over a wide area.

name: Bountiful Protection
description:
Lyleen`s exclusive skill.
Restores health to all allies within range using the power of healing.

name: Brawn Impact
description:
Blazamut's exclusive skill.
 Raises and inflates its arms, then slams them together, causing a massive explosion in the surrounding area.

name: Cat Press
description:
Grintale's exclusive skill.
Grins menacingly before leaping into the air and smashing foes with its body.

name: Chicken Rush
description:
Chikipi's exclusive skill.
Flies at enemies in its sights, attacking them with its sharp beak.

name: Cloud Tempest
description:
Fenglope's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while manipulating the atmosphere to create a pressurized wind tunnel around itself.

name: Crushing Punch
description:
Mossanda's exclusive skill.
Winds up its fist before striking an enemy with a devastating punch.

name: Cryst Breath
description: Enshrouds an enemy in a frigid blast of air, dealing continuous damage.

name: Crystal Wing
description:
Frostallion's exclusive skill.
Dashes forward while creating frigid air around its wings, using them to slash enemies.

name: Daring Flames
description:
Kitsun's exclusive skill.
Charges forward with great speed while clad in intense blue flames.

name: Dark Ball
description: Unleashes a sphere of darkness that slowly tracks down the enemy.

name: Dark Charge
description:
Pyrin Noct's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while clad in a veil of dark flames.
Flames continue to burn in its trajectory.

name: Divine Disaster
description:
Shadowbeak's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while generating orbs of light that automatically capture enemies. The orbs automatically capture enemies, before releasing a barrage of lasers.

name: Draconic Breath
description: Exhales breath imbued with draconic energy, dealing continuous damage to those in front of it.

name: Earth Impact
description:
Mammorest's exclusive skill.
Uses massive body to shake the earth, dealing damage over a wide area.

name: Emperor Slide
description:
Penking's exclusive skill.
Lies on its belly while generating frozen air all around it before sliding at enemies at high speed.

name: Fierce Fang
description: Direhowl's special skill. Swiftly leaps at an enemy and bites into them.

name: Fire Ball
description: The ball explodes over a wide area upon impact.

name: Flare Arrow
description: Fires three flaming arrows in succession that home in on an enemy.

name: Flare Storm
description: Generates two flaming tornadoes on either side before launching them at an enemy

name: Fluffy Tackle
description:
Melpaca's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while clad in an aura of sublime adorableness.

name: Focus Shot
description:
Robinquill's exclusive skill.
Takes aim while drawing its bow before loosing a powerful shot at an enemy.

name: Forceful Charge
description:
Anubis's exclusive skill.
Pursues its foe with a high speed dash while releasing energy and unleashes a powerful punch.

name: Freezing Charge
description:
Reindrix's exclusive skill.
Charges at an enemy with antlers adorned in ice.

name: Gale Claw
description:
Galeclaw's exclusive skill.
Soars through the air with its talons outstretched forward.

name: Giga Horn
description:
Warsect's exclusive skill.
Skewers enemies with its four sturdy horns.

name: Ground Pound
description:
Gorirat's exclusive skill.
Pounds the ground twice before leaping into the air and unleashing a powerful punch.

name: Ground Smash
description:
Anubis's exclusive skill.
Leaps high into the air before diving to the ground with a punch. The force of the impact deals damage over a wide area.

name: Hellfire Claw
description:
Incineram's exclusive skill.
Draws near enemies using its left claw to slash them into the air before cutting them down with its right claw.

name: Iaigiri
description:
Bushi's exclusive skill.
After Holding the sword, he appears in front of the enemy in an instant and unleashes a Ultra-fast sword draw attack.

name: Ice Missile
description: Creates ice lances in the air that fly towards enemies

name: Ignis Slam
description:
Pyrin's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while clad in a veil of flames.
Flames continue to burn in its wake.

name: Jumping Claw
description:
Loupmoon's exclusive skill.
Leaps forward and attacks twice with vicious claws imbued with dark energy.

name: Kerauno
description:
Orserk's exclusive skill.
Summons a blade of lightning while leaping into the air before throwing it at an enemy.

name: Kingly Slam
description:
Kingpaca's exclusive skill.
Kingpaca exclusive skill. Leaps high into the air before smashing into an enemy with its massive body.

name: Lightning Bolt
description: Charges electric energy before blasting enemies with a powerful shock.

name: Lightning Claw
description:
Grizzbolt's exclusive skill.
After leaping at an enemy and tearing at it twice with its electrically charged claws, it attacks the ground, sending an electric shock throughout the area.

name: Lightning Streak
description: Generates a lightning bolt that moves forward in a line

name: Lightning Strike
description: Acts as a lightning rod, calling down thunderbolts that electrocute the surrounding area.

name: Megaton Implode
description:
Tocotoco's exclusive skill.
Risks life to cause a massive explosion. Those who perish for their duty become glistening stars in the night sky.

name: Moonlight Beam
description: Selyne's exclusive skill. Stores energy in the moon on its back, then fires a crescent-shaped beam forward.

name: Muscle Slam
description:
Broncherry's exclusive skill.
Turns sideways before tackling enemies in front of it, sending them flying into the air.

name: Mystic Whirlwind
description:
Elphidran's exclusive skill.
Generates twin whirlwinds imbued with a mysterious power that pursues enemies.

name: Phantom Peck
description:
Cawgnito's exclusive skill.
Teleports next to an enemy before attacking with its beak.

name: Phoenix Flare
description:
Faleris's special skill.
Covers its body in a tornado of flames before charging forward.

name: Poison Blast
description: Hurls poison sludge at an enemy

name: Poison Fog
description: Generates a fog of poison in front, causing the opponent to become poisoned.

name: Power Bomb
description: Charges a massive amount of energy before firing a large destructive ball.

name: Punch Flurry
description:
Cattiva's special skill.
Pursues enemies, repeatedly punching them with both its fists.

name: Reckless Charge
description:
Rushoar's special skill.
Takes aim at a foe and rushes at them with a made charge.

name: Roly Poly
description:
Lamball's special skill.
Curls into a ball, rolling after any enemies in its way.
Becomes dizzy and unable to move after the attack ends.

name: Bog Blast
description: Hurls sticky mud at an enemy.

skillFruit.name: Grass Skill Fruit: Seed Machine Gun

name: Shell Spin
description:
Digtoise's exclusive skill.
Moves while spinning its whole body at high speeds.
Drills through enemies, dealing continuous damage.

name: Spear Thrust
description:
Paladius's exclusive skill.
Clads itself in holy power before charging forward with its spear. The shield in its other hand protects from attacks during the charge.

name: Spinning Lance
description:
Elizabee's exclusive skill.
Channels power into its staff, and unleashes it in a whirl.

name: Spinning Roundhouse
description:
Anubis's exclusive skill.
Anubis special skill. Performs a spin kick with its strong legs, cutting down enemies over a wide area.

name: Spirit Fire
description: Shoots fireballs towards an enemy. The fireballs explode after a short distance, generating smaller fireballs that spread forward.

name: Stone Cannon
description: Digs up a boulder and hurls it at an enemy

name: Tornado Attack
description: Nitewing's exclusive skill. Generates a tornado before soaring towards its target.

name: Twin Spears
description:
Necromus's exclusive skill.
Clads its twin spears with vicious whirlwinds and charges forward, thrusting them one after the other.

name: Volcanic Burst
description:
Reptyro's exclusive skill.
Raises its front legs before slamming them onto the ground, causing volcanic eruptions under its enemies.
It simultaneously bombards them with volcanic bombs from above.
